name: S-Force Rappa Chiyomaru
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｓ－Ｆｏｒｃｅ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>セキュリティ・フォース</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> <ruby lang="jp"><rb>乱</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>らっ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>破</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぱ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>小</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ち</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>夜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>よ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>丸</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>まる</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Each of your opponent's monsters in the same column as one of your "S-Force" monsters can only target that monster for attacks. (Quick Effect): You can banish 1 "S-Force" card from your hand; return this card to the hand, and if you do, Special Summon 1 "S-Force" monster from your Deck in Defense Position, except "S-Force Rappa Chiyomaru". You can only use this effect of "S-Force Rappa Chiyomaru" once per turn.
mnst_eff: Each of your opponent's monsters in the same column as one of your "S-Force" monsters can only target that monster for attacks. (Quick Effect): You can banish 1 "S-Force" card from your hand; return this card to the hand, and if you do, Special Summon 1 "S-Force" monster from your Deck in Defense Position, except "S-Force Rappa Chiyomaru". You can only use this effect of "S-Force Rappa Chiyomaru" once per turn.
eff: Each of your opponent's monsters in the same column as one of your "S-Force" monsters can only target that monster for attacks. (Quick Effect): You can banish 1 "S-Force" card from your hand; return this card to the hand, and if you do, Special Summon 1 "S-Force" monster from your Deck in Defense Position, except "S-Force Rappa Chiyomaru". You can only use this effect of "S-Force Rappa Chiyomaru" once per turn.

action: Returns itself from field to hand
attack: Prevents other cards being targeted for attacks
